workflow_name: E2E DPAgent Multi-step Workflow Long Run
primary_goal: Complete a realistic multi-role DPAgent workflow with ordered planning, architecture, implementation planning, integration, QA, and final delivery evidence. Each phase must create its required artifact and report DONE through TeamTool.

phase_tasks.title: Phase 1: product requirements and acceptance baseline
acceptance: Create docs/dpagent-long/01_requirements.md containing DPAGENT_LONG_REQ_DONE.
Document user goals, workflow scope, non-goals, and acceptance criteria for this E2E run.
Call task_report_done for wf_requirements_brief after the artifact is written.

phase_tasks.title: Phase 2: solution architecture and module contract
acceptance: Create docs/dpagent-long/02_architecture.md containing DPAGENT_LONG_ARCH_DONE.
Define components, data flow, runtime boundaries, failure handling, and how later phases consume the requirements.
Call task_report_done for wf_solution_architecture after the artifact is written.

phase_tasks.title: Phase 3A: backend contract and API plan
acceptance: Create docs/dpagent-long/03_backend_contract.md containing DPAGENT_LONG_BACKEND_DONE.
Define endpoint contracts, state transitions, validation rules, and observability signals.
Call task_report_done for wf_backend_contract after the artifact is written.

phase_tasks.title: Phase 3B: frontend flow and UX state plan
acceptance: Create docs/dpagent-long/04_frontend_flow.md containing DPAGENT_LONG_FRONTEND_DONE.
Define screens, user feedback states, error states, and how UI consumes backend events.
Call task_report_done for wf_frontend_flow after the artifact is written.

phase_tasks.title: Phase 4: integration plan and executable smoke manifest
acceptance: Create docs/dpagent-long/05_integration_plan.md containing DPAGENT_LONG_INTEGRATION_DONE.
Create src/dpagent-long-e2e/README.md with a concise smoke manifest and dependency order.
Call task_report_done for wf_integration_plan after both artifacts are written.

phase_tasks.title: Phase 5: QA matrix and risk checklist
acceptance: Create docs/dpagent-long/06_qa_matrix.md containing DPAGENT_LONG_QA_DONE.
Define test matrix, edge cases, regression gates, and risks linked to earlier artifacts.
Call task_report_done for wf_qa_matrix after the artifact is written.

phase_tasks.title: Phase 6: final delivery summary
acceptance: Create docs/dpagent-long/07_final_summary.md containing DPAGENT_LONG_FINAL_DONE.
Summarize completed artifacts, phase order, QA status, and remaining risks.
Call task_report_done for wf_final_delivery after the artifact is written.
